# Elsner Solexa 230V handset/sensor
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/issues/2798
#
# All 60 known-good messages recovered from the issue's elsner.zip captures
# (rauar's 2024-01-20 comment), decoded with `-Y minmax -R 364:vv`. CRC-16
# (poly 0x1021, init 0x68b3) validates on all of them; the payload itself is
# not decoded (see elsner_solexa.c), so annotations are just the button/label
# each capture's directory name recorded.

# automode
# g001_868.25M_1000k.cu8
